code:
%%{
  init: {
    'theme': 'base',
    'themeVariables': {
      'activationBorderColor':'#000',
      'activationBkgColor':'#F00',
      'primaryColor': '#FFF',
      'primaryTextColor': '#000',
      'primaryBorderColor': '#000',
      'lineColor': '#000',
      'secondaryColor': '#FFF',
      'labelBoxBorderColor':'#F00',
      'tertiaryColor': '#000',
      'fontFamily':'Times New Roman'
    }
  }
}%%
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant Settler
    participant Issuer 1
    participant Issuer 2 ... Issuer N
    participant Payer
    activate Settler
      Settler->>Settler: Generates preimage=key
      Settler->>Settler: Encrypts the message with the key 
      Settler->>Payer:encrypted message
      Settler->>Settler: Computes payment hash for the preimage  
      Settler->>Issuer 1: invoice(hash,amount=a1) 
    deactivate Settler
    activate Issuer 1
      Issuer 1->>Issuer 2 ... Issuer N: invoice(hash,amount=a1+a2) 
    deactivate Issuer 1
    activate Issuer 2 ... Issuer N
      Issuer 2 ... Issuer N->>Payer: invoice(hash,amount=a1+...+aN) 
    deactivate Issuer 2 ... Issuer N
    activate Payer
      Payer->>Issuer 2 ... Issuer N:pay(hash,amount=a1+...+aN)
    deactivate Payer
    activate Issuer 2 ... Issuer N
      Issuer 2 ... Issuer N->>Issuer 1:pay(hash,amount=a1+a2)
    deactivate Issuer 2 ... Issuer N
    activate Issuer 1
      Issuer 1->>Settler:pay(hash,amount=a1)
    deactivate Issuer 1
    activate Settler
      par
        Settler->>Issuer 1:preimage
      and
        Settler->>Issuer 2 ... Issuer N:preimage
      and
        Settler->>Payer:preimage=key
        activate Payer
          Payer->>Payer:decrypt message with the key
        deactivate Payer
      end
    deactivate Settler

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个多跳支付的序列图，核心角色是Settler、Issuer 1、Issuer 2到Issuer N，还有Payer。流程是Settler生成preimage作为key，然后加密消息给Payer。
明白了。Settler先激活，然后自己生成preimage=key，同时加密消息。那Settler给Payer的是encrypted message，对吧？
对。然后Settler计算payment hash，给Issuer 1发invoice，金额是a1。Issuer 1再转给Issuer 2到Issuer N，金额变成a1+a2。
好的，我先把Settler的激活和自引用画好，包括Generates preimage=key和Encrypts the message with the key，然后连到Payer的encrypted message，再连Issuer 1的invoice(hash,amount=a1)。
elements_involved: Encrypts the message with the key

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 接下来Issuer 2到Issuer N把invoice发给Payer，金额是a1+...+aN。然后Payer开始反向付款，先付给Issuer 2到Issuer N。
画好了。Issuer 2到Issuer N激活后给Payer发invoice，然后Payer激活，回pay(hash,amount=a1+...+aN)。
付款继续往回传：Issuer 2到Issuer N付给Issuer 1，金额a1+a2；Issuer 1再付给Settler，金额a1。最后Settler同时把preimage发给三方。
最后一步是par并行块对吧？Settler同时给Issuer 1、Issuer 2到Issuer N发preimage，还有给Payer发preimage=key，然后Payer自己解密消息。
完全正确。还有样式要求：activation背景用红色，边框黑色，字体用Times New Roman，labelBox边框也红色。
样式配好了，红色激活背景、黑色边框、Times New Roman字体。整个流程从Settler生成key开始，到并行分发preimage结束。
检查一下：Issuer 1给Issuer 2到Issuer N的金额应该是a1+a2，不是a2对吧？要确保累加逻辑正确。
确认一下，Issuer 1转出去的是invoice(hash,amount=a1+a2)，接收方是Issuer 2到Issuer N。累加逻辑没问题，a1+a2是正确的。
没问题了。整个图完整呈现了从Settler生成preimage，经过多层Issuer转发invoice，Payer反向付款，最终Settler并行释放preimage让Payer解密的完整流程。
